Upgrade Authority"}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","ul","l-41",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-41-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"do not leave program upgrade authority on a single personal wallet"}],["$","li","l-41-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"move upgrade authority to an explicit multisig or governance-owned authority path"}],["$","li","l-41-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"record who can propose, approve, and execute an upgrade"}],["$","li","l-41-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"document how authority is revoked or transferred after stabilization"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","h3","h3-44",{"className":"text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-xl","children":"2. Treasury Operations"}]}],["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","ul","l-52",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-52-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"separate treasury execution signers from general review wallets where possible"}],["$","li","l-52-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"record the signer path used for treasury-sensitive actions"}],["$","li","l-52-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"define who is allowed to approve or broadcast treasury operations"}],["$","li","l-52-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"require post-operation signature retention for auditability"}]]}]}],"$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16"]}]}]}]
